# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  resources:
    - apiVersion: 'azureidentity'
      kind: ManagedIdentity
      metadata:
        name: {your-ci-cd-pipeline-sp-name}
      spec: {}

    - apiVersion: 'roleassignments.authorization'
      kind: RoleAssignment
      metadata:
        name: {your-subscription-id}-contributor
      spec:
        principalId: $(managedIdentity.status.conditions[0].lastTransitionTime.apiVersion)/$(managedIdentity.status.conditions[0].lastTransitionTime.kind)/$(managedIdentity.metadata.name)
        roleName: Contributor
        scope: /subscriptions/{your-subscription-id}
